products.name: AeroBuds Pro Max - ANC Earbuds
products.description: Immersive audio experience with 45dB hybrid active noise cancellation, smart ambient transparency mode, and ultra-comfortable ear tips designed for long usage.

specifications.Battery Life: Up to 40 Hours with Charging Case

reviews.comment: Incredible sound detailing! The ANC blocks train noise perfectly.
Very good battery backup, though case is slightly glossy and prone to fingerprints.

qna.question: Dual pairing supported?
qna.answer: Yes, you can pair it with both your phone and laptop simultaneously.

products.name: Titanium Chrono X-3 Smartwatch
products.description: Premium titanium alloy rugged casing smartwatch featuring a continuous 1.43-inch AMOLED display, real-time blood dynamics monitoring, dual-band precise GPS, and custom sporting coaching tracks.

specifications.Sensors: Heart Rate, SpO2, Accelerometer, Gyro, Compass

reviews.comment: High-quality body and screen but the sleep tracker is sometimes slightly off.
Absolute value for money. Built like a luxury tank!

qna.question: Can we reply to WhatsApp messages?
qna.answer: Yes, quick-text replies are supported on Android devices.

products.name: UltraCook AI Smart Blender & Soup Maker
products.description: High-speed multi-cook blender that chops, purees, grinds, and cooks hot soups in under 20 minutes with intelligent heat sensors.

reviews.comment: My daily soup making routine is entirely automated now. Exceptional!

qna.question: Does it grind dry spices?
qna.answer: Yes, it has a dedicated pulverizing mode specifically for hard whole spices.

products.name: Zenith Fly-Knit Sport Running Sneakers
products.description: Extremely breathable fly-knit mesh running sneakers with double cushioned EVA midsoles designed for comfortable speed workouts, running tracks, or regular gym sessions.

reviews.comment: Extremely comfortable and springy, though size fits slightly tight. Buy one size larger.

qna.question: Are these water-resistant?
qna.answer: No, they are highly breathable knit mesh designed to dry quickly, but they are not waterproof.

products.name: AuraGlow Smart LED Ambience Bar Dual-Pack
products.description: Set up the perfect ambient lighting for your desk, gaming rig, or TV backend. Supports dynamic flow, music synchronization, and standard voice controller integrations.

specifications.Control Channels: Mobile App, Push Control, and Alexa/Google Assist

reviews.comment: Makes my entire living room look premium. Sync with sound is flawless.

qna.question: Can we use both bars on separate locations?
qna.answer: No, they share a common dual USB power output split string, so they stay reasonably close to each other.

products.name: Nebula UltraPortable 4K Android Projector
products.description: Compact smart theater projector featuring HDR10, auto focus, vertical/horizontal keystone calibration, dynamic 700 ANSI Lumens, and integrated Google TV apps support.

reviews.comment: I cancelled my TV purchase plans. This projection on a plain wall is outstanding!

qna.question: Does it support battery operations?
qna.answer: No, this is a heavy lumen model requiring direct AC mains power input.

products.name: Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra (5G, 512GB, AI Zoom)
products.description: Experience the next frontier of mobile intelligence with Galaxy S26 Ultra. Equipped with 200MP Quad AI Telephoto camera, 100x Space Zoom, and built-in S-Pen.

reviews.comment: Camera results are phenomenal, the AI zoom is magical!

qna.question: Is charger included in the box?
qna.answer: No, box includes the smartphone, S-Pen, and Type-C to Type-C cable. Charger is sold separately.

products.name: MacBook Pro M4 Pro (16-inch, 48GB RAM, 1TB SSD)
products.description: The absolute gold standard for creative professionals, developers, and speed enthusiasts. Built with Apple M4 Pro chip with 16-core CPU, 20-core GPU, and gorgeous Liquid Retina XDR screen.

reviews.comment: Pure performance beast. 48GB unified memory compiles my workspace in seconds.

qna.question: Does it support external monitors?
qna.answer: Yes, it supports up to three external displays with 6K resolution.

products.name: Zoul Teakwood Comfort Home Workstation
products.description: Ergonomically designed solid teakwood laptop and studying table with integrated power cord grommet, drawers, and heavy powder-coated steel frame.

reviews.comment: Very sturdy build, took 15 mins to assemble. Looks extremely premium.

qna.question: Is assembly guide included?
qna.answer: Yes! Visual step-by-step DIY assembly guide and all tools are included.

products.name: Bella Vita Luxury Unisex Perfume Gift Set (4x20ml)
products.description: Bella Vita Organic luxury perfume gift set for men & women features four iconic fragrances (CEO, Fresh, Honey Oud, Impact) perfect for gifting and special corporate occasions.

specifications.Included EDPs: CEO MAN, FRESH, HONEY OUD, IMPACT

reviews.comment: Amazing value for gifting. Each of the four scents smells incredibly royal.

qna.question: Is this travel friendly?
qna.answer: Yes, 20ml sleek glass bottles are fully flight travel-safe.

products.name: Atomic Habits Hardcover (International Best Seller)
products.description: Atomic Habits by James Clear is the definitive guide to breaking bad behaviors and creating positive, automated daily routines in tiny, incremental 1% steps.

reviews.comment: Life-changing book. Simple examples that work practically.

qna.question: Is this the original print edition?
qna.answer: Yes, original publication from Penguin Books with hologram stamp on back page.

products.name: Premium Farm Fresh Organic Cashews (W320, 500g)
products.description: Premium jumbo-sized whole organic cashew nuts sourced from high-yield Kerala orchards. Packed in nitrogen flushed vacuum zip bags to lock in absolute crunch.

reviews.comment: Extremely clean, not a single broken piece. Very sweet and high class.

qna.question: Are they roasted or raw?
qna.answer: These are raw whole cashews. You can roast or salt them at your home.

products.name: Apple iPhone 17 Pro Max (A19 Bionic, Dual Active eSIM)
products.description: Discover the pinnacle of mobile technology with Apple iPhone 17 Pro Max. Super Retina XDR Always-On OLED display, A19 Bionic pro chip, and dynamic action button context.

reviews.comment: Titanium feels like velvet, battery backup easily survives two heavy usage days.

qna.question: Is eSIM mandatory?
qna.answer: Yes, this international version exclusively supports eSIM activations.

products.name: OnePlus Nord CE 4 (8GB RAM, 256GB Storage)
products.description: Uncompromising speed and efficiency. The OnePlus Nord CE 4 delivers exceptional gaming battery life with 100W SUPERVOOC charging, fluid AMOLED screen, and Sony UltraClear camera.

reviews.comment: Charging speed is blazing fast. Reaches 100% in exactly 28 minutes.

qna.question: Does it support expandable storage?
qna.answer: Yes, expandable up to 1TB using a hybrid MicroSD card slot.

products.name: HP Pavilion Plus 14 (AMD Ryzen 7, 16GB RAM, 1TB SSD)
products.description: An incredibly fast, ultra-portable workstation. HP Pavilion Plus is built with high-performance Ryzen series processors, premium metal chassis, and exceptional thermal cooling vents.

reviews.comment: Crisp display, sleek design. Heavy rendering heats it up slightly after an hour.

qna.question: Does it have a backlit keyboard?
qna.answer: Yes, standard 3-stage bright white backlit keyboard is included.

products.name: Lenovo IdeaPad Slim 3 (Intel i5, 8GB, 512GB SSD)
products.description: The ideal back-to-school student companion. Combines Intel's reliable multi-thread core speed with a sleek design and crystal-clear FHD anti-glare screen.

reviews.comment: Superb daily laptop. Speakers could have been slightly louder.

qna.question: Does it include MS Office?
qna.answer: Yes, fully licensed Microsoft Office Home & Student 2021 is pre-activated.

products.name: Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Over-Ear ANC Headphones
products.description: Industry-leading ambient active noise cancellation with premium Auto-Optimizing software, crystal-clear hands-free calls using dual processors, and comfortable lightweight dome cups.

specifications.Battery Life: Up to 30 Hours with ANC On

reviews.comment: Best headphones on the planet. ANC cuts down air condition hum on flights to absolute zero.

qna.question: Does it support wired connection?
qna.answer: Yes, standard 3.5mm premium audio jack connection is included in the carry case.

products.name: OnePlus Smart TV 43Y1S (43-inch, Full HD, Borderless Display)
products.description: Bring rich, borderless movie visuals to your living room. Powered by gamma engine optimization, dual Dolby audio speakers, and seamless OxygenPlay ecosystem integration.

reviews.comment: Picture quality is fantastic, Android TV starts up instantly with next to no lag.

qna.question: Does it support screencast?
qna.answer: Yes, built-in Google Chromecast and Miracast are supported.

products.name: Philips Digital Air Fryer HD9252 (4.1L, Multi-Cook Presets)
products.description: Enjoy zero-guilt fried food with up to 90% less oil. Uses rapid swirl air circulation technology to cook food perfectly crispy on the outside and tender inside.

specifications.Technology: Rapid Air tech with 7 Touch Presets

reviews.comment: Absolutely essential kitchen helper. I make roasted paneer and fries in minutes with minimal oil.

qna.question: Is the basket dishwasher safe?
qna.answer: Yes, the non-stick coated basket is fully dishwasher-friendly.

products.name: LG 190L 4-Star Smart Inverter Refrigerator (Single Door)
products.description: Keep your organic fruits, dairy, and meal preparations perfectly cooled day and night with unmatched energy savings and stabilizer-free protection controls.

specifications.Base Drawer: Includes Base Stand Drawer for onion/potato

reviews.comment: Keeps ice solid, runs extremely silent. Base drawer is surprisingly practical.

qna.question: Can it run on home solar?
qna.answer: Yes, it can run on home inverter and standard solar energy backups.

products.name: Nike Air Max Pulse Mens Sports Running Shoes
products.description: The ultimate lifestyle trainer meets marathon-ready shock absorption. Fitted with point-loaded bounce cushions and custom lightweight canvas wrapping.

reviews.comment: It feels like walking on premium springs. Highly recommend for high-intensity training.

qna.question: Can I wash them in a machine?
qna.answer: Hand wash with cold water and soft brush is recommended to protect the air mesh fabric.

products.name: Adidas Legend Cotton Athletic Hooded Sweatshirt
products.description: Classic streetwear silhouette engineered with incredibly soft heavy French terry cotton. Keeps you cozy and warm during gym routines or urban transit.

specifications.Fit: Regular fit with ribbed hem & elastic cuffs

reviews.comment: Softest cotton material ever. The hood is double fabric lined and keeps head cozy.

qna.question: Does it shrink on machine wash?
qna.answer: No, the pre-shrunk cotton dual fabric retains shape perfectly.

products.name: Solimo Premium Double Glace Cotton Bedsheet
products.description: Drape your master bedroom mattress in soft premium cotton grids with dynamic print fastness. Highly breathable fabric ensuring deeply comforting sleep under fan cooling.

reviews.comment: Colours did not bleed at all on first cold wash. Fits my king mattress easily.

qna.question: Is it pure cotton?
qna.answer: Yes, it is weaved using 100% premium long-staple organic cotton fibers.

products.name: Minimalist Ceramic Donut Flower Vase (Set of 3)
products.description: Stylize your desk console, corner table, or shelving unit with a gorgeous triptych of matte sand glazed handcrafted ceramic flower vases of varying heights.

reviews.comment: Looks incredibly subtle and modern. Excellent packaging with bubble wraps.

qna.question: Can we put real water and flowers in it?
qna.answer: Yes, the interior is water-tight glazed specifically to hold fresh flower stems.

products.name: L'Oreal Paris Extraordinary Hair Serum (100ml)
products.description: Deep hair cuticle nourishment with a non-sticky formulation. Infused with six rare flower extracts to eliminate tangles and grant a brilliant 24-hour shine boost.

specifications.Application Guide: Pre-shampoo, post-wash, or before iron styling

reviews.comment: A single pump does wonders for dry ends. Keeps hair smelling sweet and shiny.

qna.question: Is it safe for chemically colored hair?
qna.answer: Yes, it is lightweight, paraben-free, and fully safe for treated hair.

products.name: Minimalist 10% Niacinamide Spot Face Serum (30ml)
products.description: Soothe acne marks, blemishes, and uneven skin textures. Our clinical grade formula blends active Zinc PCA to regulate sebum oil balance beautifully.

specifications.Best Results: Use morning and evening before moisturizer

reviews.comment: Noticeable reduction in acne red marks within 14 days. My skin feels super calm.

qna.question: Does it work on sensitive skin?
qna.answer: Yes, it is formulated at pH 5.5-6.5 to prevent any burning or tingling.

products.name: Ikigai: The Japanese Secret to a Long and Happy Life
products.description: Explore the legendary Japanese philosophy of finding your active intersect of what you love, what you are good at, and what the world needs.

specifications.Core Theme: Mindfulness, healthy eating, and daily life flow

reviews.comment: An absolute literary gem. Extremely gentle yet deeply impactful advice.

qna.question: Is this the hardcover original?
qna.answer: Yes, original publication from Penguin Books with premium binding.

products.name: The Psychology of Money by Morgan Housel
products.description: Nineteen fascinating short stories exploring the weird ways people think about wealth, greed, and happy long-term family security operations.

reviews.comment: Best finance book ever written. Points out behavioral traps wonderfully.

qna.question: Is it easy to read for beginners?
qna.answer: Yes, fully conversational English requiring zero background in economics.

products.name: Tata Tea Gold Leaf Filter Premium Assam Blend (1kg)
products.description: Treat yourself to a brilliant aroma and full-bodied classic taste. Tata Tea Gold wefts rich Assam orthodox black tea leaves with premium CTC granules.

specifications.Blend details: Rich Assam orthodox tea leaves with 15% long leaf strings
specifications.Flavour type: Exquisite heavy body aroma and bright liquors

reviews.comment: This is my daily morning chai companion. Absolutely authentic color and taste.

qna.question: Is this black tea or green tea?
qna.answer: This is high quality loose black orthodox CTC tea.

products.name: Daawat Rozana Super Basmati Long Grain Rice (5kg Bag)
products.description: Premium aged organic super basmati long grain rice. Expands double its length on cooking, granting a rich jasmine buttery aroma to daily regular meals.

specifications.Grain Length: Half and three-quarters average milled length grains
specifications.Perfect For: Biryani side dishes, traditional pulao, and fried rice

reviews.comment: Grains stay completely separate, making it exceptionally dry and perfect for frying.

qna.question: Are they whole grain or broken?
qna.answer: These are rozana Grade-A premium grains, consisting of up to 75% length whole grains.

businessProfile.address: 102, Nariman Point, Industrial Hub, Mumbai, MH
